goal: P99 inference latency spiked from 45ms to 847ms. 23% of requests are timing out. SLA is 200ms. A deployment was made today. Identify the bottleneck component AND the specific configuration change responsible. Use: inspect, query_logs, check_metrics, compare_configs, submit_diagnosis.
alert_summary: [CRITICAL] P99 latency: 847ms (SLA: 200ms). 23% request timeout rate. Deployment at 09:15 UTC. Current time: 12:45 UTC.

logs.msg: Upstream timeout rate: 23%. Requests queuing. load_balancer responding slowly.
Request rate unchanged at 890 req/s. Issue is latency, not volume.

load_balancer.description: Distributes load between feature_preprocessor_v1 (old) and feature_preprocessor_v2 (new). v2 was deployed at 09:15.

logs.msg: feature_preprocessor_v2 response time degrading: avg 620ms. Routing 50% traffic to v1 as fallback.
feature_preprocessor_v2 avg response time: 780ms. Health check failing intermittently.

feature_preprocessor_v2.description: New version deployed 09:15 UTC. Processes features before model inference.

logs.msg: Deployment complete. config: batch_size=512, max_memory=8GB, workers=4.
Memory usage: 2.1GB. Batch processing time: 145ms for batch_size=512.
Memory usage: 4.8GB. GC pressure detected. Processing time: 510ms.
Memory usage: 6.2GB / 8GB. WARNING: approaching OOM. Processing time: 780ms. Memory leak suspected.
Memory at 7.1GB. OOM imminent. Recommend immediate rollback or config change.

model_server.description: Waits for features from feature_preprocessor. Blocking on slow v2 responses.

logs.msg: Waiting >500ms for features from feature_preprocessor_v2. Timeout threshold: 200ms.
23% of requests timed out waiting for feature_preprocessor_v2.

cache_service.description: Result cache. Not involved in this incident.

logs.msg: Cache hit rate: 42%. All operations nominal.

config_diff.author: ml-infra-bot
config_diff.pr_title: feat: upgrade feature preprocessor batch size for throughput
config_diff.note: batch_size increased 16x to improve throughput. Memory limit raised to accommodate. Memory leak under large batches not caught in staging (staging used batch_size=64).
